reasoning: As of November 9, 2025, NATO's Article 5 has not been invoked in 2025. The only historical invocation of Article 5 occurred following the September 11 attacks. Although Article 4 was recently invoked (for instance, regarding Russian airspace incursions in September 2025), NATO has explicitly avoided escalating to Article 5 to prevent direct conflict with Russia. With less than two months remaining in 2025, the base rate and current geopolitical posture strongly suggest that an Article 5 invocation is highly unlikely. I am forecasting at the minimum allowed probability of 2%.
